textByHash.e1f92260c70c7bb3caf6d7c3316e226e0297e872: There was only one guard on last night. Harold. He's a nice lad, if a little dim.
textByHash.cd71ce86081d789432f8850b01d47543a956d36f: Harold is staying at the Toad and Chicken.
textByHash.af30ba08a0db6af75c2238aca64b1a8f8fda06e8: No, sorry. I wouldn't want to go north-east from here, it's very rocky and barren.
textByHash.2b095db556dd7a6cb4b4d65ba49afe7f2d32533f: Hmm. Harold has got in trouble a few times over his drinking and gambling. Perhaps he'd open up after a drink?
textByHash.3669aba3eedcace2f27ffcbd696aaac8fd04fd71: Yes, if you buy Harold a beer he might talk to you. I also know he has a weakness for gambling. Hope that helps!
textByHash.15289d4c6cde33ff69d39a211d697a0812b7d091: Welcome to Burthorpe Castle! Home to his Royal Highness the Prince of Burthorpe, Heir to the Throne of Asgarnia!
textByHash.8765435e17cb859bda96860dd878a2fdcf387dc2: Anything else I can help you with?
textByHash.58877b441dcb9d8ee72d452360dede10946e98bb: We do not disclose his majesty's business.
textByHash.4f4f9619d211373098345792c9c67c0e0b2a2472: Yes actually I do, we need another servant.
textByHash.607f969591fe08fcf13f006b265425045e47ecdb: Yes, it's the... er... Empty the Cesspit Quest!
textByHash.ab512efa8593ad55a8507f8574a0fc65125bbe0b: I have a question for you.
textByHash.2ba3fa01f7b19ac0b94e945a7cc6928e5bc24315: Please enter the answer to the question.
